description: Mack, Daisy, Fitz, and Robbie coordinate their plan to storm the compromised prison. Arguments erupt about Robbie joining, with Daisy vouching for him due to his ability to fight the ghosts. The group divides up, with roles assigned and Mack cautioning Robbie about restraint. Fitz distributes the antidote, and the team arms up, ready to enter the dangerous situation.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Well, from what I can tell, Lucy and her cohorts are searching cell by cell for Eli Morrow, which means they don't know where he is.
Yeah, except I have now lost them. So they're either avoiding the cameras or they've reverted to a halituous state.
A hali... They've gone all ghostly.
Yeah. Well, they are scientists. They tend to think strategically in these situations. That's what makes us such formidable adversaries.
At least they haven't infected the prisoners.
I didn't bring you down here to settle scores.
Really? ‘Cause I don't think you can control that thing inside of you. And if I have to shoot you to keep him from coming out... I will.
We're here to, uh... rescue you?
Then we back up Mack and Robbie. Agents, we need Warden Green and his C.O.s lucid if we're gonna retake this place. Plus, the “demon” conversation gets stale.
I know it's a little public, but it's the fastest route to Eli's cell. Believe me.
It's how they're organizing. All the new Watchdogs, they're recruiting in prison, uniting against us.
Fitz, we could really use that exit.
If I release the door, all the doors in cellblock A open. The s-security wings, the exterior exits...
